creator: shawn@shauber.net
text: I would like to second the request for this to be considered for an EN to 12.1-RELEASE. I spent almost half a day recently trying to figure out why passing through a NIC on one particular Xeon 12.1 host was crashing the host before I found this bug. I’d be surprised if the new Xeon systems I’ve recently ordered don’t also have the same issue. As this if for a production environment, I’d prefer not to have to run off of 12-STABLE.
